narrative:
DRIVER
USD leads CSM at 100 on both D1 and H4 in a Risk-Off High regime, powered by Iran-US geopolitical escalation, a VIX spike to 18.43, and copper collapsing 4.15% confirming commodity-linked currency destruction. USDCAD is the cleanest expression with D1+H4 both buy, H4 momentum at 70 and rising, and AUDUSD correlation at -0.56 compounding AUD's brutal H4 CSM fade from 65 to 26, a 39-point divergence that is the single most critical short-term signal in this brief.

MOMENTUM
Gaining: USDCAD CMP 60 with D1 59 rising and H4 70 rising, full-stack alignment
Fading: EURUSD CMP 37 with H4 momentum 13 collapsing, GBPUSD CMP 36 H4 13 collapsing, NZDUSD CMP 43 H4 17 collapsing

WATCH
Chinese April data release Monday hits AUDUSD directly; a miss extends the AUD H4 CSM fade and confirms AUDUSD short continuation.
US 10Y yield at 4.595 rising 3% pressures USDJPY; a push through resistance triggers H4 buy acceleration from current neutral.
Iran-US escalation headline risk targets USDCHF long; H4 buy signal at +3 with momentum 78 accelerates on any military confirmation.

themes.theme: Geopolitical escalation - Iran-US tensions with military options on table
Risk-off sentiment from equity selloff and bond yield spike
Inflation concerns driving bond yields higher
Federal Reserve policy uncertainty under Trump administration
Asian economic data release Monday - Chinese April data

key_observation: Perfect storm developing: geopolitical escalation with Iran, equity selloff, inflation concerns, and bond yield spike create classic risk-off environment favoring USD, JPY, and CHF. Trump Fed policy uncertainty adds complexity but currently overshadowed by immediate risk events.
watch: Tuesday Trump situation room meeting outcome on Iran military options. Monday Chinese April data for CNY direction. Equity market follow-through on Friday selloff. Fed policy communications regarding inflation.
